body_txt: Stock Response to two characters acting in an unusually lovey-dovey way , or flirting (but generally what each character thinks of as covertly, since they often Cannot Spit It Out ), or fighting . Occasionally used sincerely in the event of Coitus Uninterruptus , and in the other direction, also used on non-sexual friends (often but not always Heterosexual Life-Partners ) by the resident Deadpan Snarker . Mood Dissonance , both to "get back to the comedy already!" in the first two versions and to keep viewers from becoming more titillated than they should be for the time slot . A Sister Trope to Why Don't You Marry It? . In the rare semi-serious instances, it may forestall a couple from Making Love in All the Wrong Places and/or being Overcome with Desire . A much less aggressive counterpart is Leave the Two Lovebirds Alone .
